PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?actor (COUNT(?film) AS ?filmCount) ?decade WHERE {
  ?film dbo:starring ?actor ;
        dbo:releaseDate ?releaseDate .
  BIND((FLOOR(xsd:decimal(YEAR(?releaseDate))/10)*10) AS ?decade) 
} GROUP BY ?actor ?decade
ORDER BY DESC(?filmCount)
LIMIT 1
